---
title: "Failure Chronicle"
subtitle: "rejections, failed experiments, and unfunded grants."
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

> *paper publication can be very random, just try the best and keep records.*

---

## Paper rejections

::: {.failure-box}

:::

### details see below

| Years | Paper (first authored/corresponding authored) | What happened |
|---|---|---|
| 2019–2022 | Actively did science but zero 1st-authored paper | Cannot say the reasons |
| 2023 | *A low-dimensional manifold of human exploratory behavior reveals opposing roles for apathy and anxiety* | Desk rejected by Current Biology; PNAS |
| 2024 | *Distinct Computational Mechanisms of Uncertainty Processing in Anxiety and Apathy* | Rewrote and re-analyzed / re-framed the paper to this. Desk rejected by Nature Communications; Nature Human Behaviour; Nature Mental Health; PNAS; eLife; PLoS Biology. Major revision at BPCNNI |
| 2024 | *Too smart for one's own good? Evolution favors individuals with a low-level theory of mind in a complex network* | Under review at PNAS, then rejected |
| 2024 | *Cognitive flexibility and gut* | Under review at PNAS, then rejected |
| 2024–2025 | *Distance and angle matter: unveiling the optimal seating positions for perceiving teacher's social cues in virtual reality learning environments* | Under review at Computers and Education:<br>2024.6–2024.10 — major revisions ROUND1<br>2025.1–2 — two reviewers were convinced but new reviewer #4 said NO<br>Under review at BJET, rejected by AI reviewer #1 |
| 2025 | *Nonlinear modulation of human exploration by distinct sources of uncertainty* | Under review at PNAS, then rejected |
| 2025–2026 | *Dynamic prefrontal coupling coordinates adaptive decision-making* | Desk rejected by Neuron; Nature Neuroscience.<br>Under review at Nature Communications:<br>2025.5–2025.9 — major revisions ROUND1<br>2025.11–2025.12 — major revisions ROUND2<br>2026.2 — rejected<br>2026.5 — appealed and major revision ROUND3<br>2026.6 — rejected |

A few that stung in particular:

- The three-round major revision at *Nature Communications* on the dmPFC/dlPFC restless bandit paper, ultimately rejected. The response to reviewers ran to 190 pages.

---

## Grant applications

::: {.failure-box}
*To be filled in as the trail lengthens.*
:::

---

## Job applications

::: {.failure-box}
**2022 postdoc cycle** — 1 offer / 10 applications.

**2024.6–2024.12** — YC China / MiraclePlus (venture capital). Last round failed, after the CEO interview and background investigation.
:::

---

## Failed experiments

::: {.failure-box}
3 published / 9 succeeded / 5 failed.

:::

---
